--- Round 1 ---
<think>The question asks: "请回答'营业收入较上一报告期变化'最高的公司是哪一个？" (Which company has the highest change in operating revenue compared to the previous reporting period?)

I'm processing DOC3, which is a 2024 Q1 report for 云南恩捷新材料股份有限公司 (Yunnan Enjie New Material Co., Ltd.).

From the anchor summaries, I can see:
- DOC3_A2 mentions: 营业收入2,327,574,815.97元，同比下降9.38% (Operating revenue 2,327,574,815.97 yuan, year-over-year decrease of 9.38%)

This gives me the revenue change percentage for this company (-9.38%).

To answer the question properly, I need to:
1. Extract the exact revenue change information from DOC3
2. Note that I'm only processing ONE document at a time, so I should extract the evidence from this document and let the system handle cross-document comparison

Let me open DOC3_A2 to get the exact verbatim text about the revenue change.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC3_A2","expected_evidence":"营业收入及同比变化数据"}</search>
